title: WATCH:  Millions dig out from blizzard that brought 3+ feet of snow to parts of Northeast
fullText: Millions dig out from blizzard that brought 3+ feet of snow to parts of NortheastResidents are now bracing for a fast-moving clipper set to bring more snow and ice from Minnesota to New York.February 24, 2026
summary: Residents are now bracing for a fast-moving clipper set to bring more snow and ice from Minnesota to New York.
